name: Weather Dominance
short_description: Play as an intelligent cloud with powerful weather abilities like rain, lightning, and snow to defeat aliens who are causing natural disasters on prehistoric earth. Restore the environment and help the primitive earthlings in randomly generated levels
detailed_description:
Weather Dominance is a 2D twin-stick shooter with roguelike elements where you play as an intelligent cloud wielding 6 powerful weather abilities: rain, lightning, snow, hail, wind, and storm. Each enemy has weaknesses to specific weather types, so mastering your abilities is key to survival.

In prehistoric times an alien invasion struck Earth. The aliens attacked innocent animals and caveman tribes, conducting cruel experiments on the planet. With their advanced technology they could even brainwash living beings, turning animals, plants, and even clouds into their servants.

The cavemen, armed only with sticks, rocks, and primitive spears, were no match for the invaders. Seeing this unfair battle, the clouds decided to intervene and fight back to protect the Earth.

After choosing your cloud, your objective is to defeat alien forces and their brainwashed minions across a variety of environments. Along the way you can also restore nature by using your rain ability to grow plants, trees, and flowers, earning rewards for helping the environment.

Defeating enemies and nurturing the land grants you Cloud Coins, a special currency used to buy upgrades in Cloud Shops which appear randomly on the world map. You can also strike deals with friendly cloud NPCs to exchange items.

Your challenge is to survive 5 in-game days, with each randomly generated level representing one day. Levels span diverse biomes such as landscapes, skylands, caves, and the exosphere. Once all areas are unlocked and explored you will face the final boss, whose defeat yields an Upgrade Bubble.

Upgrade Bubbles permanently enhance your cloud, making you stronger, faster, more resilient, and unlocking new attack methods. With each upgrade you evolve into the ultimate weather force.
